limitations: Edges are inferred; they are not confirmed ICE transmission lines.

objective.gamma_range_formula: gamma_l ~ Uniform(0, pi / max_abs_J), where max_abs_J = max_(i,j) |J_ij|; if max_abs_J = 0, gamma_l = 0
objective.name: weighted_max_cut
